title: Senior Frontend Developer at Ninjacart Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Ninjacart Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ninjacart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!
